name: Open Impetus Turn
preceding_figure_names: Back Lock, Drag Hesitation, Left Whisk, Natural Turn, Progressive Chasse To R, Reverse Corte
following_figure_names: Chasse From Promenade Position, Weave From Promenade Position, Cross Hesitation, Wing, Left Whisk
notes:
Different from leading Wing, in which, Man allows upper body to do extra rotation to allow Lady to pass from one side of body to another.
In this Cross Hesitation, Man's arms remain on his right side, you want Lady to stay in your right front.
Position held | FDC | TH (RF) | -- | Sways(S) | lower e/o 6

steps.action: LF back, BLOD, TH, start to turn R, Sway(S), CBM
RF closes to LF (Heel Turn), FDC, HT, 3/8 btwn 1-2, Sway(L), rise e/o 2
LF diag. fwd in PP, L side leading, Pointing DC, body facing LOD, slight body turn to R, Sway(S), up, lower e/o 3
RF fwd, FLOD, HT, start to turn R, Sway(S), CBM
LF to side, BDC, T, 3/8 btwn 1-2, Sway(R), rise e/o 2
RF to side in PP, brushed to LF, Pointing Center, moving DC, TH, 3/8 btwn 2-3, body turns less, Sway(S), up, lower e/o 3
